items.title: Amazon is offering up to 50% Prime Day savings on EGO Power+ tools and lifestyle equipment – all starting from $70
items.summary: As part of the Amazon Prime Day Sale, you can find a wide array of EGO tools and lifestyle equipment getting up to 50% savings. One of the brand’s most popular lawncare solutions, the EGO Power+ 56V 21-inch Cordless Electric Select Cut Touch Drive Self-Propelled Lawn Mower with 2x 6.0Ah batteries, can be scored for $659.25 shipped during this event. Down from $879, we’ve been seeing more frequent discounts on the 2x 4.0Ah battery bundle this year (currently $20 higher in price), with this package here instead having seen a previous long-term discount to $779 and otherwise keeping to its full price. Now, you’re getting a $220 markdown off the going rate, landing it at the second-best price we have tracked – just $10 above the low we last saw in May 2025. Head below to see the entire lineup of Prime Day EGO deals while they last, and be sure to also check out our Prime Day Green Deals hub where everything is collected together.

items.title: Save up to 50% on Sharge’s unique power banks and chargers for Prime Day with deals from just $20
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, Sharge’s official Amazon storefront is offering a bunch of solid deals on its chargers and power banks. Almost all of the brand’s new and popular charging units are on sale now, starting at just $19.99 shipped. Many of these are up to 50% off for Prime Day, making this a great time to cash in and add some unique chargers like this 67W unit with a Dot Matrix display to your kit. items.title: Heads up! DJI’s Osmo Pocket 3 vlogging camera down is down to $378 all-time low for Prime Day
items.summary: As part of its ongoing Prime Day sale, you’ll find DJI’s Osmo Pocket 3 4K vlogging camera down at $378 shipped (fulfilled by Amazon). B&H is also matching this price today as part of its Summer sale event, in case you’re looking for more ways to buy it. Either way, you’re looking at the lowest price ever on this popular vlogging camera, down from its usual going of $499. We did see it briefly drop to the $400 mark earlier this year at Woot as part of a daily deals offer, but today’s Prime Day offer beats that by an additional $22 to mark a new best price to beat. Even with the newer Osmo Pocket 4 now on the scene, the Pocket 3 remains a compelling option at $378 for anyone looking to step up from their phone camera.

While we are expecting to see a large portion of the deals from day 1 carry into today, and perhaps even through Friday, we know for sure there will be plenty of new deals up for grabs – Amazon has already confirmed as much and we saw a lot more than a few new offers throughout the day yesterday.
